game_name: Ayrton Senna's Super Monaco GP II

sub_pixel_system.notes: Racing game; sub-pixel data not documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Transmission Selection
special_mechanics.description: Player can choose automatic, 4-speed semi-automatic, or 7-speed manual transmission before races. Manual transmission provides greater speed than automatic.

special_mechanics.name: Stripe Handling
special_mechanics.description: Unlike the first game, this version does not reduce car speed when driving over stripes in corners (per Ayrton Senna's suggestion during development).

tier_notes: Tier 2: Game is a racing simulator rather than a platformer. Available sources (Wikipedia, TCRF) contain no quantitative physics data for vehicle movement, acceleration, or handling. Documentation focuses on gameplay modes, track selection, and development history rather than technical physics parameters.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Ayrton Senna's Super Monaco GP II
